field_evidence.critical_condition_basis: Liquid chromatography at critical conditions (LCCC) allows separation of the polymers with regard to chemical composition by making one of the block chromatographically invisible, that results in predominant influence of noncritical block on chromatographic retention.
field_evidence.mobile_phase_solvents: acetone/water = 37/63 v/v, while solvent B was methanol/water = 87/13 v/v.

conditions.critical_condition_basis: Liquid chromatography at critical conditions (LCCC) allows separation of the polymers with regard to chemical composition by making one of the block chromatographically invisible, that results in predominant influence of noncritical block on chromatographic retention.
conditions.physical_address: Division of Advanced Materials Science and Department of Chemistry, Pohang University of Science and Technology (POSTECH), Pohang 37673, Republic of Korea; International Centre for Chemical and Biological Sciences (ICCBS), University of Karachi, Karachi 75270, Pakistan
conditions.detector: polymer laboratories PL ELS 2100, an evaporating light scattering detector
